description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The front features a paved driveway and a rectangular patch of green lawn, bordered by low walls. Large windows dominate the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The exterior is finished in a combination of white and gray tones, with clean lines and a boxy silhouette. The side and rear views reveal additional windows and a private backyard area enclosed by walls. The overall structure is compact, with a focus on functional outdoor and indoor living spaces.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a minimalist white and gray exterior. Features a front driveway, green lawn, and enclosed backyard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, driveway, green lawn, and large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, flat roof, and additional windows along the side wall.
description_view_2: Rear view with a focus on the back wall, upper story, and enclosed backyard area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the length of the house, flat roof, and green backyard space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows on the front and sides
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, no porch, and a paved driveway leading to the entrance
